zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Quartermain於1378年出生在英國奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓時，她的父親Thomas Quartermain40歲，母親Joan Russell39歲。她於1395年與John Bruley在英國奧可福爾沃特斯東可結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年在英國武斯特斯爾哈格利享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Quartermain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Quarterman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Germaine, Marcel, Pascal.

English (Oxfordshire and Surrey): nickname from Anglo-Norman French quatre mayns, quatre mans ‘four hands’, which has been taken to imply ‘mail-fisted’ but was perhaps used of a skilled craftsman or a dextrous juggler or conjuror.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Quartermain was born in 1378, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Quartermain, was 40 and her mother, Joan Russell, was 39. She married John Bruley in 1395, in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1410, in Hagley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 32.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Quartermainが1378年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンで生まれた時，父Thomas Quartermainは40歳，母Joan Russellは39歳であった。1395年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアワテルストックでJohn Bruleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1410年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアハグリーで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Quartermain(이)가 1378년 영국 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Quartermain(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Russell(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 스퍼드실르 왓르스톡에서 John Bruley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 워스스터실르 하글리에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Quartermain родилась в 1378 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Quartermain было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Russell, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bruley в 1395 г. в местности вэитирстокк, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1410 г. в местности хагли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет.
